## Community adapter submission

**Package ID:** <!-- e.g. django-adapter -->
**Description:** <!-- one sentence on what domain or framework this adapter targets -->

### Checklist

- [ ] `adapter_package.yaml` — id, name, description, version, author filled in
- [ ] `adapter_profile.md` — adapter profile payload complete
- [ ] `review_metadata.yaml` — left as template (maintainer fills this in)
- [ ] Adapter lives under `contrib/community_adapter_registry/submissions/<package_id>/`
- [ ] CI schema validation passes

### Notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know — edge cases, target toolchain version, related adapters, etc. -->
